tasks.summary: Add batch filter bar to screener template + view
tasks.description: Add filter inputs (price_min, price_max, rent_min, cap_rate_min) above the screening results table. Update the screener view to accept and apply these query params to the queryset.

acceptance_criteria.description: Screener page renders filter bar with price/rent/cap rate inputs
Filter by price_max returns only properties under that price

tasks.summary: Add sortable column headers to screener results table
tasks.description: Add clickable column headers (price, cap rate, GRM, score) that toggle sort direction. Update view to accept sort/order query params and apply order_by to the queryset.

acceptance_criteria.description: Clicking price header sorts by price

tasks.summary: Verify leasing kanban JS parameter names match backend
tasks.description: Read the leasing kanban template JS to verify the fetch POST uses property_id and new_stage parameters that match the backend view. Fix if mismatched (same issue as pipeline kanban).

acceptance_criteria.description: Leasing kanban view returns HTML with 8 stage columns
JS fetch uses property_id and new_stage parameter names
